title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-427-C. Revision: C. Type: design-note. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2025-01-19. Last modified: 2025-04-26. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1038, P-1083.
